gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, as dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; also, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, with healthcare providers showcasing community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; students also line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps amidst dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, while students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
